examples: The night of our birth, a thunderstorm had cracked a tree in the courtyard of the new church, setting the building afire.
Peter's heart was afire with his colorful life.
He discovered, by some accident, that flesh roasted in front of afire tasted better.
The U.K. is growing at a 3% rate, and Ireland's a land afire.
Strachan said Keller's house nearby was set afire Sunday after the slayings, but it failed to spread beyond the kitchen.
